title: matricaria conoclinia
intro: Matricaria conoclinia, also known as Trailing Tanacetum or Concolina, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Matricaria conoclinia include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
